name: Alsei, the Sylvan High Protector
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>羅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>守</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> アルセイ
desc:
2 Level 8 monsters
Once per turn: You can declare 1 card name; excavate the top card of your Deck, and if it is the declared card, add it to your hand. Otherwise, send it to the GY. If a card(s) is sent from your Deck to the GY by a card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 card on the field; place that target on either the top or bottom of the Deck. You can only use this effect of "Alsei, the Sylvan High Protector" once per turn.

action: Adds excavated cards to the hand
Sends excavated cards to the Graveyard
Sends from the top of your Deck to your Graveyard
Places cards from the player's field on the top of the Deck
Places cards from the player's field on the bottom of the Deck
Places cards from the opponent's field on the top of the Deck
Places cards from the opponent's field on the bottom of the Deck
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
